gene_region.label: MTHFR transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical MTHFR genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: MTHFR encodes methylenetetrahydrofolate reductase, an enzyme that produces 5-methyltetrahydrofolate for homocysteine remethylation and one-carbon methyl-donor metabolism.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local MTHFR bundle is one-carbon-metabolism oriented. Common MTHFR variants are context modifiers and should not be overinterpreted as diagnostic thrombophilia or deterministic disease findings.
variant_effect_overview: C677T and A1298C can influence enzyme activity and homocysteine context, especially with folate status and genotype dosage.
Clinical interpretation should follow current professional guidance and avoid unsupported deterministic claims.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: MTHFR methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for MTHFR.
Because MTHFR biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use MTHFR promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000177000: MTHFR coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: MTHFR biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an MTHFR one-carbon-metabolism thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to folate-dependent methyl-donor balance, homocysteine remethylation, nutritional status, or cardiometabolic association studies. Common MTHFR variants should not be treated as deterministic clinical diagnoses.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T / Ala222Val) is curated as a MTHFR marker for Folate and homocysteine metabolism, Methyl-donor and one-carbon pathway context. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a MTHFR pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T / Ala222Val) with MTHFR methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T / Ala222Val) or linked MTHFR locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Folate and homocysteine metabolism, Methyl-donor and one-carbon pathway context
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T / Ala222Val) as a gene-specific marker for Folate and homocysteine metabolism, Methyl-donor and one-carbon pathway context and folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance.
